Class CurrentConsent

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DashboardDataItemLogic
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.current.CurrentConsent
public class CurrentConsent extends DashboardDataItemLogic
This class is used for generating the data item bct.current.consent.
